summary: Iteration 13 - Stabilization testing complete. All 25 backend tests passed. Core flows (signup, login, password reset, demo mode, plan limits) working correctly. UI verified: dashboard stats match data, sidebar shows actual plan name, property limit modal shows upgrade prompt, onboarding wizard appears for new users, empty states are helpful and actionable, mobile layout works with sidebar toggle.
passed_tests: Backend: Signup with valid credentials creates Solo plan user
Backend: Signup with duplicate email returns 400
Backend: Login with valid credentials returns token
Backend: Login with wrong password returns 401
Backend: Login with non-existent email returns 401
Backend: Password reset request returns success (mocked)
Backend: Solo plan user cannot add >1 property (403)
Backend: Portfolio plan allows up to 5 properties
Backend: Demo mode creates Portfolio account with 3 UK properties
Backend: Demo creates varied compliance statuses (compliant, expiring_soon, overdue)
Backend: Dashboard stats match actual data counts
Backend: Dashboard data endpoint returns complete structure
Backend: New user has incomplete onboarding status
Backend: Demo user has completed onboarding
Backend: Onboarding can be completed via API
Backend: Notifications generated for expiring/overdue items
Backend: Unread notification count in dashboard stats
Backend: Mark notification as read works
Backend: Property validation requires name, address, postcode
Backend: Compliance record validation requires title, category
Backend: Task validation requires title
Backend: User response includes plan info (subscription_plan, property_limit)
Backend: Subscription endpoint returns detailed plan info
Backend: Status badges update correctly on expiry date change
Frontend: Landing page loads with Demo Mode button
Frontend: Demo mode navigates to dashboard
Frontend: Dashboard shows Demo Mode banner
Frontend: Sidebar shows 'Portfolio (Trial)' not hardcoded 'Free Trial'
Frontend: Dashboard stats show correct counts (3 properties, 2 expiring, 2 overdue)
Frontend: Signup form works with validation
Frontend: Onboarding wizard appears for new users
Frontend: Login shows 'Invalid email or password' for wrong credentials
Frontend: Property limit modal shows upgrade prompt when limit reached
Frontend: Mobile sidebar hidden by default, opens on hamburger click
Frontend: Mobile sidebar shows Portfolio plan
Frontend: Compliance page shows all status badges (Compliant, Expiring Soon, Overdue)
Frontend: Compliance page shows all categories
Frontend: Empty dashboard shows welcome message and CTA
Frontend: Empty tasks page shows helpful message and templates
Frontend: Empty properties page shows helpful message and CTA

test_credentials.demo_mode: No credentials needed - creates temporary Portfolio account via 'Try Demo Mode' button
test_credentials.new_signup: Any valid email/password (8+ chars) creates Solo plan trial account

seed_data_creation: Demo mode creates: 3 UK properties (Victoria Terrace Apartment, Cotswold Cottage, Edinburgh Old Town Flat), 12 compliance records with mixed statuses, 6 tasks
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 13 stabilization complete. All core flows working: signup/login/password reset, plan limits (Solo=1, Portfolio=5, Operator=15), dashboard data consistency, status badges, sidebar plan display, onboarding wizard, empty states. Email notifications remain MOCKED. Property limit modal shows upgrade prompt with pricing (£39/month for Portfolio).

auth_flows.details: Signup creates Solo trial, login validates credentials, password reset mocked

plan_limits.details: Solo=1 property, Portfolio=5, Operator=15. 403 error with upgrade message when limit reached

property_limit_modal.details: Shows 'Property Limit Reached' with current plan, usage (1/1), upgrade prompt to Portfolio (£39/month)

sidebar_plan_display.details: Shows actual plan name (Solo/Portfolio/Operator) with (Trial) suffix, not hardcoded 'Free Trial'

dashboard_data_consistency.details: Stats match actual data: properties count, expiring soon, overdue, missing, tasks due

demo_mode.details: Creates Portfolio trial with 3 UK properties, 12 compliance records, 6 tasks

onboarding_wizard.details: Appears for new users with 3 steps: Add property, Add compliance, View dashboard

empty_states.details: Dashboard, Tasks, Properties pages show helpful messages with CTAs and pro tips

mobile_layout.details: Sidebar hidden by default, hamburger menu opens sidebar, stats cards stack in 2-column grid

form_validation.details: Backend validates required fields (property name/address/postcode, compliance title/category, task title)

status_badges.details: Compliant (green), Expiring Soon (amber), Overdue (red) - update based on expiry date

notifications.details: Generated for expiring/overdue items, unread count shown in header badge

mocked_apis.email_notifications: Marked 'Coming soon' in UI - toggles save to DB but no actual emails sent
mocked_apis.password_reset_email: Returns success message but no actual email sent
